name: Al's Chocolate to the Max.
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Package of Semisweet Chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together first four ingredients in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave the cream until just beginning to boil.
3. Add the hot cream and continue blending until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into small sherbet or wine glasses (disposable plastic ones).
5. Refrigerate for several hours.
This is chocolate to the MAX! Few people refuse one of these, and few can eat more than one.
